<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create a new character."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/characters"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



If a character with the given ID already exists, its info is returned
without creating a duplicate (upsert semantics).

  id={"request"}
